examples: Dr Spadafora showed recently that reverse transcriptase is required for mouse embryos to develop.
Baltimore shared a nobel prize in physiology or medicine in 1975 for the discovery of reverse transcriptase .
They detected activity of the retroviral enzyme reverse transcriptase, a direct sign of retrovirus replication.
One works by inhibiting the activity of a viral enzyme called reverse transcriptase.
Dr Wilson and his colleagues have discovered that the complex finds its way to the active site of a viral enzyme known as reverse transcriptase.
